name: RODE VideoMic Me-L Directional Microphone for iOS Devices
description: If you're shooting mobile iOS video and want better audio than what your phone provides—or if you need to record VO or ADR on the go—the Rode VideoMic Me-L is worth your consideration.

features.Key Features :: For Mobile Video or Mobile VO | Shotgun-Style Mic with iOS Connector | Included Mic Clip & Furry Windscreen | 3.5mm & Lightning Connections | Compatible with Built-In Audio Apps | Cardioid Pattern Tamps Down Room Tone | Monitor/Record with 3.5mm Headphone Jack | Broadcast-Quality Capture up to 48 kHz
features.What's in The Box :: RODE VideoMic Me-L Directional Microphone for iOS Devices | Mic Clip | Furry Windshield
